description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests Runner that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: linux-test, windows-test, and macos-test, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest respectively). For each job, use a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.7 to 3.11). In each job, check out the code, set up the Python environment, install dependencies, build, and run tests with pytest.
